endpoints.name: GET /about
endpoints.description: Gets the information about the current user along with Drive API settings
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /apps
endpoints.description: Lists a user's installed apps.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /apps/{appId}
endpoints.description: Gets a specific app.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPID}} with a real appid.

endpoints.name: GET /changes
endpoints.description: Lists the changes for a user or shared drive.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /changes/startPageToken
endpoints.description: Gets the starting pageToken for listing future changes.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /changes/watch
endpoints.description: Subscribe to changes for a user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /changes/{changeId}
endpoints.description: Deprecated - Use changes.getStartPageToken and changes.list to retrieve recent changes.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CHANGEID}} with a real changeid.

endpoints.name: POST /channels/stop
endpoints.description: Stop watching resources through this channel
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /drives
endpoints.description: Lists the user's shared drives.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /drives
endpoints.description: Creates a new shared drive.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /drives/{driveId}
endpoints.description: Gets a shared drive's metadata by ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DRIVEID}} with a real driveid.

endpoints.name: PUT /drives/{driveId}
endpoints.description: Updates the metadata for a shared drive.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DRIVEID}} with a real driveid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /drives/{driveId}
endpoints.description: Permanently deletes a shared drive for which the user is an organizer. The shared drive cannot contain any untrashed items.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DRIVEID}} with a real driveid.

endpoints.name: POST /drives/{driveId}/hide
endpoints.description: Hides a shared drive from the default view.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DRIVEID}} with a real driveid.

endpoints.name: POST /drives/{driveId}/unhide
endpoints.description: Restores a shared drive to the default view.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DRIVEID}} with a real driveid.

endpoints.name: GET /files
endpoints.description: Lists the user's files.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /files
endpoints.description: Insert a new file.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /files/generateIds
endpoints.description: Generates a set of file IDs which can be provided in insert or copy requests.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: DELETE /files/trash
endpoints.description: Permanently deletes all of the user's trashed files.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /files/{fileId}
endpoints.description: Gets a file's metadata or content by ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid.

endpoints.name: PUT /files/{fileId}
endpoints.description: Updates a file's metadata and/or content. When calling this method, only populate fields in the request that you want to modify. When updating fields, some fields might be changed automatically, such as modifiedDate. This method supports patch semantics.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /files/{fileId}
endpoints.description: Permanently deletes a file by ID. Skips the trash. The currently authenticated user must own the file or be an organizer on the parent for shared drive files.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /files/{fileId}
endpoints.description: Updates a file's metadata and/or content. When calling this method, only populate fields in the request that you want to modify. When updating fields, some fields might change automatically, such as modifiedDate. This method supports patch semantics.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid.

endpoints.name: GET /files/{fileId}/comments
endpoints.description: Lists a file's comments.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid.

endpoints.name: POST /files/{fileId}/comments
endpoints.description: Creates a new comment on the given file.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid.

endpoints.name: GET /files/{fileId}/comments/{commentId}
endpoints.description: Gets a comment by ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid. Replace {{COMMENTID}} with a real commentid.

endpoints.name: PUT /files/{fileId}/comments/{commentId}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing comment.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid. Replace {{COMMENTID}} with a real commentid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /files/{fileId}/comments/{commentId}
endpoints.description: Deletes a comment.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid. Replace {{COMMENTID}} with a real commentid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /files/{fileId}/comments/{commentId}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing comment.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid. Replace {{COMMENTID}} with a real commentid.

endpoints.name: GET /files/{fileId}/comments/{commentId}/replies
endpoints.description: Lists all of the replies to a comment.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid. Replace {{COMMENTID}} with a real commentid.

endpoints.name: POST /files/{fileId}/comments/{commentId}/replies
endpoints.description: Creates a new reply to the given comment.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid. Replace {{COMMENTID}} with a real commentid.

endpoints.name: GET /files/{fileId}/comments/{commentId}/replies/{replyId}
endpoints.description: Gets a reply.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid. Replace {{COMMENTID}} with a real commentid. Replace {{REPLYID}} with a real replyid.

endpoints.name: PUT /files/{fileId}/comments/{commentId}/replies/{replyId}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing reply.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid. Replace {{COMMENTID}} with a real commentid. Replace {{REPLYID}} with a real replyid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /files/{fileId}/comments/{commentId}/replies/{replyId}
endpoints.description: Deletes a reply.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid. Replace {{COMMENTID}} with a real commentid. Replace {{REPLYID}} with a real replyid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /files/{fileId}/comments/{commentId}/replies/{replyId}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing reply.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid. Replace {{COMMENTID}} with a real commentid. Replace {{REPLYID}} with a real replyid.

endpoints.name: POST /files/{fileId}/copy
endpoints.description: Creates a copy of the specified file. Folders cannot be copied.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid.

endpoints.name: GET /files/{fileId}/export
endpoints.description: Exports a Google Workspace document to the requested MIME type and returns exported byte content. Note that the exported content is limited to 10MB.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid.

endpoints.name: GET /files/{fileId}/listLabels
endpoints.description: Lists the labels on a file.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid.

endpoints.name: POST /files/{fileId}/modifyLabels
endpoints.description: Modifies the set of labels on a file.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid.

endpoints.name: GET /files/{fileId}/parents
endpoints.description: Lists a file's parents.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid.

endpoints.name: POST /files/{fileId}/parents
endpoints.description: Adds a parent folder for a file.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid.

endpoints.name: GET /files/{fileId}/parents/{parentId}
endpoints.description: Gets a specific parent reference.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid. Replace {{PARENTID}} with a real parentid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /files/{fileId}/parents/{parentId}
endpoints.description: Removes a parent from a file.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid. Replace {{PARENTID}} with a real parentid.

endpoints.name: GET /files/{fileId}/permissions
endpoints.description: Lists a file's or shared drive's permissions.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid.

endpoints.name: POST /files/{fileId}/permissions
endpoints.description: Inserts a permission for a file or shared drive.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid.

endpoints.name: GET /files/{fileId}/permissions/{permissionId}
endpoints.description: Gets a permission by ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid. Replace {{PERMISSIONID}} with a real permissionid.

endpoints.name: PUT /files/{fileId}/permissions/{permissionId}
endpoints.description: Updates a permission.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid. Replace {{PERMISSIONID}} with a real permissionid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /files/{fileId}/permissions/{permissionId}
endpoints.description: Deletes a permission from a file or shared drive.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid. Replace {{PERMISSIONID}} with a real permissionid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /files/{fileId}/permissions/{permissionId}
endpoints.description: Updates a permission using patch semantics.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid. Replace {{PERMISSIONID}} with a real permissionid.

endpoints.name: GET /files/{fileId}/properties
endpoints.description: Lists a file's properties.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid.

endpoints.name: POST /files/{fileId}/properties
endpoints.description: Adds a property to a file, or updates it if it already exists.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid.

endpoints.name: GET /files/{fileId}/properties/{propertyKey}
endpoints.description: Gets a property by its key.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid. Replace {{PROPERTYKEY}} with a real propertykey.

endpoints.name: PUT /files/{fileId}/properties/{propertyKey}
endpoints.description: Updates a property.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid. Replace {{PROPERTYKEY}} with a real propertykey.

endpoints.name: DELETE /files/{fileId}/properties/{propertyKey}
endpoints.description: Deletes a property.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid. Replace {{PROPERTYKEY}} with a real propertykey.

endpoints.name: PATCH /files/{fileId}/properties/{propertyKey}
endpoints.description: Updates a property.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid. Replace {{PROPERTYKEY}} with a real propertykey.

endpoints.name: GET /files/{fileId}/revisions
endpoints.description: Lists a file's revisions.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid.

endpoints.name: GET /files/{fileId}/revisions/{revisionId}
endpoints.description: Gets a specific revision.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid. Replace {{REVISIONID}} with a real revisionid.

endpoints.name: PUT /files/{fileId}/revisions/{revisionId}
endpoints.description: Updates a revision.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid. Replace {{REVISIONID}} with a real revisionid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /files/{fileId}/revisions/{revisionId}
endpoints.description: Permanently deletes a file version. You can only delete revisions for files with binary content, like images or videos. Revisions for other files, like Google Docs or Sheets, and the last remaining file version can't be deleted.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid. Replace {{REVISIONID}} with a real revisionid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /files/{fileId}/revisions/{revisionId}
endpoints.description: Updates a revision.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid. Replace {{REVISIONID}} with a real revisionid.

endpoints.name: POST /files/{fileId}/touch
endpoints.description: Set the file's updated time to the current server time.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid.

endpoints.name: POST /files/{fileId}/trash
endpoints.description: Moves a file to the trash. The currently authenticated user must own the file or be at least a fileOrganizer on the parent for shared drive files. Only the owner may trash a file. The trashed item is excluded from all files.list responses returned for any user who does not own the file. However, all users with access to the file can see the trashed item metadata in an API response. All users with access can copy, download, export, and share the file.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid.

endpoints.name: POST /files/{fileId}/untrash
endpoints.description: Restores a file from the trash. The currently authenticated user must own the file or be at least a fileOrganizer on the parent for shared drive files. Only the owner may untrash a file.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid.

endpoints.name: POST /files/{fileId}/watch
endpoints.description: Subscribes to changes to a file. While you can establish a channel for changes to a file on a shared drive, a change to a shared drive file won't create a notification.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid.

endpoints.name: GET /files/{folderId}/children
endpoints.description: Lists a folder's children.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FOLDERID}} with a real folderid.

endpoints.name: POST /files/{folderId}/children
endpoints.description: Inserts a file into a folder.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FOLDERID}} with a real folderid.

endpoints.name: GET /files/{folderId}/children/{childId}
endpoints.description: Gets a specific child reference.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CHILDID}} with a real childid. Replace {{FOLDERID}} with a real folderid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /files/{folderId}/children/{childId}
endpoints.description: Removes a child from a folder.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CHILDID}} with a real childid. Replace {{FOLDERID}} with a real folderid.

endpoints.name: GET /permissionIds/{email}
endpoints.description: Returns the permission ID for an email address.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EMAIL}} with a real email.

endpoints.name: GET /teamdrives
endpoints.description: Deprecated use drives.list instead.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /teamdrives
endpoints.description: Deprecated use drives.insert instead.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /teamdrives/{teamDriveId}
endpoints.description: Deprecated use drives.get instead.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TEAMDRIVEID}} with a real teamdriveid.

endpoints.name: PUT /teamdrives/{teamDriveId}
endpoints.description: Deprecated use drives.update instead.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TEAMDRIVEID}} with a real teamdriveid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /teamdrives/{teamDriveId}
endpoints.description: Deprecated use drives.delete instead.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TEAMDRIVEID}} with a real teamdriveid.
